title: We are a radio
content:
We are a radio
We are a television set
Pre recorded programming pre ordained
And looping...loopy.......looped
Signal strength (Weak (this week))
But never mind:
We have slots for inputing information
Stick something in to know what we are
You can shut us off, the adapters/the receivers
You can't shut off, the transmitter/the sender
THE SOURCE ......of.......
miscalculated misinterpreted misrepresented
misappropriated misconstrued amiss
Self appointed importance
context: From document: We are a radio
